title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Sprint Planning — 5 Skills for Agile Ceremony Preparation and Execution
description: For agile team leads and scrum masters, this pack automates backlog grooming, sprint goal writing, capacity planning, story point estimation, and sprint review summaries so they can run tighter ceremonies in half the prep time
gumroad_description:
Sprint ceremonies shouldn't eat more time than the sprint itself.

Who this is for:
— Scrum masters running four or more ceremonies per sprint with minimal prep time
— Agile team leads who hand-write sprint goals, estimations, and retrospective notes
— Engineering managers whose grooming sessions drift and never finish on time

What's inside:
— Skill 1: Backlog grooming summarizer
— Skill 2: Sprint goal writer from ticket clusters
— Skill 3: Capacity planner with PTO and context-switching adjustments
— Skill 4: Story point estimation assistant
— Skill 5: Sprint review summary generator
— Installation guide + quick-reference trigger table

Tighter ceremonies, half the prep time. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
